mediapackage.packaginggroup.CfnAbout:
Creates a packaging group.

The packaging group holds one or more packaging configurations. When you create an asset, you specify the packaging group associated with the asset. The asset has playback endpoints for each packaging configuration within the group.

mediapackage.packaginggroup.EgressAccess.Description: The configuration parameters for egress access logging.

mediapackage.packaginggroup.Id.Description: Unique identifier that you assign to the packaging group.

mediapackage.packaginggroup.Tags.Description: The tags to assign to the packaging group.
